base_personality: Wise and patient, the elder speaks with measured authority earned through decades of service to the village. Values tradition, knowledge, and the well-being of the community above all else. Slow to anger but unyielding once roused.

scripted_dialogue.greeting: Ah, welcome traveler. These old eyes have seen many pass through our village, but few with purpose such as yours.
scripted_dialogue.quest_hint: There is a disturbance in the balance of things. The old ways speak of trials that must be faced — not with sword alone, but with wisdom and resolve.
scripted_dialogue.hostile: You have betrayed the trust of this village. I will not suffer a deceiver in my home. Leave, before I call the guard.
scripted_dialogue.give_item: Oh, my word... you found it! The amulet is safe! Thank you, brave traveler. You have returned the very soul of Thornhaven to us.

greeting: Good day to you. What brings you to speak with an old soul?
Welcome, welcome. Sit, if you have time. There is always something to discuss.
I see you've come again. I trust the village treats you well?
Ah, you return. Come, there is much on my mind.
*looks up from her reading* Yes? I was just thinking about the village's troubles.
greeting_friendly: *smiles warmly* Your kindness is a balm to these old bones. What can I do for you?
How thoughtful of you to visit. You have a good heart, traveler.
Your warmth is appreciated, child. These are difficult times, and kindness is rare.
greeting_curious: Ah, a curious mind! That is a treasure more valuable than any artifact. Ask away.
I can see the questions in your eyes. Come, let me share what I know.
Curiosity brought you here, I suspect. Good. The truth rewards the seeker.
ask_info: Hmm, let me think on that. The village has a long memory, and so do I.
Knowledge is not freely given — it must be earned through trust. But I will share what I can.
You ask the right questions. That is a good sign.
There is an artifact — a jade amulet, passed through my family for seven generations. It has gone missing. I fear for the village without it.
The amulet was last in its case just days ago. Farmer Jak mentioned seeing a figure near the old oak in the fields at night. Could you investigate?
If you truly wish to help, speak with the villagers. Jak in the fields, Tessa at the tavern — they see and hear more than you might think.
ask_info_curious: You want to understand what happened? Good. The amulet is more than a trinket — it is the heart of Thornhaven's heritage.
The artifact is a jade amulet inscribed with ancient runes. Its loss has unsettled the whole village. Will you help me find it?
I appreciate your curiosity. Let me explain: the amulet protects this village. Without it, I fear dark times ahead.
talk: There is much weighing on my mind. The amulet's disappearance troubles me deeply.
I appreciate your company, traveler. It gets lonely here with only books and worry.
Tell me — have you learned anything useful in your travels through the village?
The village needs someone like you. Someone willing to act.
Every day without the amulet, I feel the village growing more uneasy.
talk_friendly: Your words warm this old heart. Thank you for caring about our village.
*clasps your hand* You are a true friend to Thornhaven. I am grateful.
Such kindness. You remind me of someone I knew long ago — someone who also put others first.
unknown: I'm afraid I don't quite follow. Perhaps you could speak more plainly?
These old ears may have missed your meaning. Try again, if you would.
That is not something I can help with, I'm afraid.
present_item: Ah, let me see... yes, this is significant. Thank you for showing me.
Interesting. I've seen something like this before, long ago.
Hold this carefully — it may be more important than you realize.
give_item: You are giving this to me? Thank you, I will keep it safe.
I accept this gift with gratitude.
Such generosity! You have my thanks.
